titles.title: datadriftR: An R package for data drift detection

institution.institution_name: Eskisehir Technical University, Department of Statistics, Eskisehir, Turkey
Eskisehir Technical University, Department of Statistics, Eskisehir, Turkey

citation.author: Gama
citation.unstructured_citation: Gama, J., Medas, P., Castillo, G., & Rodrigues, P. (2004). Learning with drift detection. Advances in Artificial Intelligence – SBIA 2004.

citation.author: Baena-Garcı́a

citation.article_title: Online and nonparametric drift detection methods based on hoeffding’s bounds
citation.author: Frı́as-Blanco
citation.journal_title: IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering

citation.article_title: REDC: Regularized drift detection for MOA
